features.name: Research, architecture and harness baseline
acceptance: GitHub solution and license research is recorded
Architecture and explicit product exclusions are recorded
Progress, feature tracking and test strategy are resumable
No temporary research clone is committed

platformGaps: No native application exists in F001; native acceptance starts with F010

features.name: Tauri application and IPC foundation
acceptance: Tauri window renders the allowlisted modular Workbench without Electron
Typed command and event bridge has stable error DTOs
Capabilities and CSP expose minimum permissions
Architecture checks reject AI, Auth, Sync, Gallery and Extension Host entrypoints or enablement
Feature completion evidence shape is validated automatically
One command runs TypeScript and Rust checks

features.name: Workspace path policy and file tree
acceptance: Open folder and file tree CRUD work in a scoped workspace
A workspace can hold multiple independently authorized canonical roots
Symlink and traversal escapes are rejected
External changes update the tree with rescan fallback

features.name: Editing, preview and hot-exit recovery
acceptance: Open, preview, pin, split, edit and save files
External save conflicts never overwrite silently
Dirty content survives window restart
Text, image and Markdown preview have safe fallbacks

features.name: Quick Open, workspace search and replace
acceptance: File and content search honor ignore and include/exclude rules
Results stream and cancel without blocking the UI
Replace plan validates file versions before writes

features.name: VS Code color theme compatibility
acceptance: Import local VSIX and unpacked theme directory
Apply workbench colors and TextMate token colors
JSONC, include and tmTheme fixtures pass
Extension code is never executed

features.name: VS Code file and product icon themes
acceptance: File, folder and expanded icon precedence matches fixtures
Font and image resources stay inside the imported theme
Unsafe SVG or missing icon IDs fall back safely

features.name: Rust PTY terminal
acceptance: Interactive shell supports input, resize, search and exit
Multiple tabs and splits clean up on window close
Backpressure and output fragmentation tests pass

features.name: Core Git workflow
acceptance: Status, diff, hunk stage, commit, fetch, pull and push work
Git output parsing is independent of locale
Untrusted workspaces never start Git or configured helper processes
Background reads cannot execute hooks, fsmonitor, external diff, textconv or credential helpers
Destructive actions preview impact and require confirmation

features.name: Native Git history and blame tools
acceptance: Inline and file blame, hover and age heatmap work
File and line history, revision navigation and compare work
Graph, refs, stash and worktree workflows pass fixtures
No GitLens Plus, account, cloud, brand or AI code is present

features.name: Generic Debug Adapter Protocol client
acceptance: Stdio and TCP transports pass fragmented frame fixtures
Breakpoints, stepping, stack, variables and evaluate work
runInTerminal uses the integrated terminal
Missing or untrusted adapters fail with actionable confirmation

features.name: Legacy subsystem retirement
acceptance: Electron and Node native runtime paths are removed
AI, Agent, Chat, MCP and Copilot paths are removed
Authentication, accounts and sync paths are removed
General Extension Host and non-theme extensions are removed
Language environments, remote, notebook, tasks and testing are removed

features.name: Branding, packaging, notices and release checks
acceptance: Bundle id, protocol, data directory and UI use Plain branding
Third-party notices and SBOM match shipped code and assets
macOS, Windows and Linux packages build in CI

features.name: Browser and native end-to-end acceptance
acceptance: Browser mock E2E covers required UI state machines
Computer-driven Tauri E2E covers real fs, PTY, Git, theme and DAP
No excluded product surface is reachable
Startup, memory and large workspace baselines are recorded
